minor_issues: No direct visual/computed-style confirmation captured for PLP H1 sizing on staging (Shop + category/tag); current evidence is verify artifacts + code-level plausibility.
Pipeline JSON scaffold was initially unexercised; this run adds concrete JSON artifacts to `tasks/pipeline-json/.../` to make the convention tangible.
PLP H1 sizing override duplicated across `assets/css/main.css` and `assets/css/parts/24-plp-table.css`, creating drift risk.
`resolveCategoryUrl()` auto-picks the first category link on `/sklep/`; could still be flaky if DOM/link order changes or no suitable links exist (fallback helps but not a guarantee).
rationale: VERIFY_REPORT indicates `verify:all` OK with `exit_code=0` and PASS for Woo flow (L1) and a11y (forced). No blocking rule failures were reported. Remaining items are non-blocking evidence/process hardening and maintainability risks.
reverify_plan: Optional: capture a staging check (Shop + one category + one tag) and record computed `font-size` for `h1.woocommerce-products-header__title.page-title`.
Optional: de-duplicate PLP H1 override into a single CSS source and rerun `verify:all`.
